changeSet.author: kai
changeSet.comment: Create materialized view for real-time revenue dashboard
changeSet.sql:
-- Aggregate table CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hourly_revenue_mv ( hour DateTime, total_revenue AggregateFunction(sum, Decimal(18, 2)), order_count AggregateFunction(count, UInt64) ) ENGINE = AggregatingMergeTree() ORDER BY hour;
-- Materialized View worker CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS hourly_revenue_worker TO hourly_revenue_mv AS SELECT toStartOfHour(event_time) AS hour, sumState(total_amount) AS total_revenue, countState(order_id) AS order_count FROM orders_analytics GROUP BY hour;
